scripts.record:mp4: mkdir -p recordings && ffmpeg -listen 1 -i "rtmp://0.0.0.0:1935/live/test" -c:v libx264 -c:a copy recordings/$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).mp4
scripts.record:debug: mkdir -p recordings && ffmpeg -loglevel debug -listen 1 -i "rtmp://0.0.0.0:1935/live/test" -c copy recordings/$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).mkv
scripts.play:hls: echo 'Pass the HLS URL as an argument:' && echo '  bunx ffplay -fflags nobuffer <HLS_URL>'
scripts.transcode: ffmpeg -i recordings/$(ls -t recordings/ | head -1) -c:v libx264 -c:a aac recordings/$(ls -t recordings/ | head -1 | sed 's/\.[^.]*$//').mp4
scripts.setup: cp -n .env.example .env && echo 'Created .env — edit it with your API key and local IP'
